feed.title: Maine Real Estate Commission News & Publications
feed.subtitle: Flat list of PDF links with no reliable per-item dates and infrequent updates; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Real Estate Commission News & Publications
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
